sample_reviews.author: Sarah M.
sample_reviews.text: OM Plumbing & Tiling did a fantastic job on our bathroom. The tiling is immaculate and all the plumbing was done cleanly and efficiently. Highly recommend!

sample_reviews.author: James T.
sample_reviews.text: Called them out for a leak under the sink — they arrived quickly, fixed the problem at a fair price, and left the place spotless. Great service.

sample_reviews.author: Priya K.
sample_reviews.text: Really pleased with the tiling work in our kitchen. Very professional, tidy, and finished on time. Would definitely use again.

brand.usp: OM Plumbing & Tiling combines quality plumbing expertise with precision tiling craftsmanship, giving Leeds homeowners a reliable one-stop solution for beautiful, fully functional bathrooms and kitchens.
brand.about_paragraph: Hi, I'm the team behind OM Plumbing & Tiling, proudly serving Leeds and the surrounding areas. We specialise in both plumbing and tiling, so whether you need a leaking pipe fixed or a full bathroom transformation, we've got you covered. We take pride in delivering high-quality workmanship, turning up on time, and leaving your home cleaner than we found it.
